query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consultation_questions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  consultation_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  answer TEXT,
  answered_by INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  answered_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (consultation_id) REFERENCES consultations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (answered_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS subscription_type ENUM('free', 'pay_per_case', 'monthly') DEFAULT 'free';
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consultations_remaining INT DEFAULT 1;
